DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DONALD WEI AND DON DOAN'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN 10 DAYS AS TO FOURTH AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION. GIVEN THE STATEMENTS IN THE OPPOSITION, IT APPEARS THAT PLAINTIFF MAY BE ABLE TO ALLEGE ADDITIONAL FACTS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT DEFENDANTS CONDUCT WAS OUTRAGEOUS AND THAT THE BROKEN ELEVATOR WAS AN UNREASONABLE CONSTRAINT. (302/PJM/DD-X) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
